# I AM THE CHANGE

| Rohit Vijay     | Sejitha            | 10/06/2026     |

## **Section 4 — Financial Background**

### **4.1. Assets at Home (tick all that apply)**

☒ Washing Machine    ☒ Fridge    ☒ AC    ☒ LED TV    ☒ Two-Wheeler    ☐  
Car    ☒ Smartphone    ☒ Separate Wi-Fi    ☐ Others: \_\_\_\_\_

Amount in ₹

5000

| Source of Income | Amount |

|                  |        |
|                  |        |

☒ Yes    ☐ No

| Sr. No.      | Loan Purpose | Loan Amount Taken | Pending Loan Amount |

|              |              |                   |                     |

NIL

Amount in ₹

4.8. If the college fee is higher, how will you manage it?

I cannot manage

4.9. If you do not receive this scholarship, how will you pay the fees?

I will not go to college

## Section 5 — Health Information

5.1. Does the student have any health issues?

☐ Yes ☒ No

5.2. If yes, list the health issues:

Describe health issues

## Section 6 — Student Commitment

6.1. Will you study college for three years without any obstacle?

Yes

6.2. If we have a training program within 15 km from your home, can you come?

☒ Yes ☐ No ☐ Maybe

6.3. Are you ready to send your son/daughter to weekly skill development classes on Sundays (16 classes a year)?

☒ Yes ☐ No

## Section 7 — Scholarship Information

7.1. Has the student received or applied for any other scholarships for their UG degree?

Yes

## Section 8 — Volunteer Observation

8.1. What is your opinion about the student, their family members, and their living condition?

The Student is living a very good life with parents  
Don't Give Scholarship.

8.2. Will you recommend this student for this scholarship?

☒ Yes    ☐ No    ☐ Not Sure

8.3. Any other comments you want to share?

Rh
